title: Sketchfab License Agreement
scope: Restrictions on standalone or extractable redistribution of material licensed under Sketchfab standard terms

title: FSO Polonez

title: Ford Sierra

title: Ford Type 9 / Sierra-family standard ratio set

limitations: Used as a requested cross-application reconstruction. An original Ford workshop specification tied to the exact FSO gearbox suffix was not recovered.

limitations: Exact production dates and vehicle records remain pending.

limitations: Forum URLs were not supplied; suitable for provisional reconstruction.
